SEARCH
Package org.unlaxer.tramli

Class FlowEngine

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowEngine
public final class FlowEngine extends Object
Generic engine that drives all flow state machines.

Exceptions

  • FLOW_NOT_FOUND — resumeAndExecute(java.lang.String, org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowDefinition<S>) with unknown or completed flowId
  • INVALID_TRANSITION — resumeAndExecute(java.lang.String, org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowDefinition<S>) when no external transition exists
  • MAX_CHAIN_DEPTH — auto-chain exceeded 10 steps
  • EXPIRED — flow TTL exceeded at resumeAndExecute(java.lang.String, org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowDefinition<S>) entry
Processor and branch exceptions are caught and routed to error transitions. Context is restored to its pre-execution state before error routing.

  • Method Details

    • setTransitionLogger

      public void setTransitionLogger(Consumer<LogEntry.Transition> logger)
      Set transition logger. Called on each state transition.

    • setStateLogger

      public void setStateLogger(Consumer<LogEntry.State> logger)
      Set state logger. Called on each context.put(). Opt-in for debugging.

    • setErrorLogger

      public void setErrorLogger(Consumer<LogEntry.Error> logger)
      Set error logger. Called when a processor throws or error transition fires.

    • setGuardLogger

      public void setGuardLogger(Consumer<LogEntry.GuardResult> logger)
      Set guard logger. Called when a guard returns Accepted/Rejected/Expired.

    • getTransitionLogger
